Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The model consists of the following nodes receive_order check_inventory authorize_payment package_items ship_order cancel_order close_order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The structure is successful_subtree a parallel operator with children authorize_payment package_items ship_order cancel_subtree a sequence operator with children cancel_order close_order xor_node an XOR operator with children successful_subtree and cancel_subtree root a sequence operator with children receive_order check_inventory xor_node close_order

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: But note that the root sequence includes xor_node and then close_order But note that the cancel_subtree already includes close_order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So if we take the cancel_subtree we would have close_order from the cancel_subtree and then another close_order from the root

Name: Validation - PE
Text: in process trees the children are executed in sequence So if we take the cancel_subtree we execute cancel_order and then close_order Then after the xor_node we have another close_order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: That would mean two close_order events in the trace

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The root is sequence receive_order check_inventory xor_node close_order So the xor_node is a choice between successful_subtree and cancel_subtree After the xor_node we have close_order So in the cancel branch we have cancel_order then close_order from cancel_subtree then close_order from root

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the traces are receive_order check_inventory authorize_payment package_items ship_order close_order or any permutation of authorize_payment package_items ship_order and receive_order check_inventory cancel_order close_order close_order

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - IND
Text: the domain says If inventory insufficient Cancel Order then Close Order So in both cases we have one close_order So the model should have exactly one close_order

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: one valid trace is Receive Order Check Inventory Cancel Order Close Order Close Order

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This trace includes two Close Order activities whereas the domain model expects exactly one Close Order activity to complete the process Having two Close Orders is redundant and indicates a flaw in the process model
